details: The bucket policy allows public read access to exported customer data snapshots. Public access block is not fully enabled.
recommended_action: Enable S3 Block Public Access, remove anonymous access from the bucket policy, and verify whether any data exposure occurred.

details: Inbound TCP/22 is allowed from 0.0.0.0/0 on a production administrative security group attached to an EC2 bastion host.
recommended_action: Restrict SSH access to approved administrator IP ranges or replace direct SSH exposure with a managed access path.

details: The CI deployment service account has roles/editor at the project level, allowing broad modification of resources outside its deployment scope.
recommended_action: Replace broad project roles with scoped roles required for deployment only and review recent usage for unnecessary actions.

details: The firewall rule allows TCP/3389 from 0.0.0.0/0 to Windows management instances in the production VPC.
recommended_action: Limit RDP access to trusted administrator ranges or disable direct public RDP access entirely.

details: The NSG permits direct inbound management traffic from an internet-facing subnet to an application subnet instead of routing through the approved jump host segment.
recommended_action: Update NSG rules to enforce the approved management path and document the expected VNet traffic flow for the application tier.

details: A support automation identity has been assigned the Owner role at the subscription scope, exceeding the permissions needed for ticket-based maintenance tasks.
recommended_action: Replace the subscription Owner assignment with a least-privilege role set aligned to the automation workflow and confirm emergency access is documented separately.

details: The OCI security list allows inbound TCP/3389 from 0.0.0.0/0 to a subnet hosting administrative Windows instances.
recommended_action: Restrict RDP exposure to trusted source ranges or remove the public rule and use a controlled administrative access method.

details: A staging operations group can manage all resources in the tenancy compartment even though its normal work is limited to compute restart and instance inspection tasks.
recommended_action: Replace the broad manage policy with narrower verbs for the required resource families and confirm which maintenance actions actually need to remain.
